name: Mudabbir (PHP + Composer)
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; cd apps/backend; php -m | grep -qi pdo_sqlite || (sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends libsqlite3-dev && sudo docker-php-ext-install pdo_sqlite); composer install --no-interaction'
